heading: Designation of chapter
label: 4301 Designation of chapter
text: This chapter shall be known as the “Trading with the enemy Act.”1So in original.1
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Trading with the enemy Act, also known as the Trading with the Enemy Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Oct. 6, 1917, ch. 10640 Stat. 411
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 1 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
